channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Opposite the Ceder Malvern road, 12th April
item.description:
Fridge dumped here for a few weeks

Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Small - Less than one bag (Parks)

item.title: Hazelmere Road pedestrian area between Glengall and Priory Park ard, 12th April
item.description:
Dumped rubbish
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Priory Park Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Medium - Up to medium size van load

item.title: Has this work been forgotten?, 12th April
item.description:
This mess has been in the park for over a year with no progress. Will it ever be finished? It's just a mess currently with no clear view of what is being fixed

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Beckenham Place Park, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Trees need support, 12th April
item.description:
New young trees the support needs replacing outside no. 1, 4, and 6

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): St George's Road, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping outside property, 12th April
item.description:
A mass amount of rubbish has been dumped outside of 194-196 Kingsland Road, no use of bin bags either, books, pills, shoes, etc all just dumped on the pavement and some overspilling into the road.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kingsland Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: They are taking the piss now - paints and all sorts left outside No. 13, 12th April
item.description:
Ridiculous!

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Pellerin Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Forest bikes abandoned on Rochester Road, 12th April
item.description:
Forest bikes blocking clearly marked disabled parking bay

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 122, Kentish Town Road, Kentish Town, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lime bikes abandoned on Rochester Road, 12th April
item.description:
Lime bikes blocking clearly marked disabled parking bay

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 122, Kentish Town Road, Kentish Town, Greater London

item.title: Broken bike, 12th April
item.description:
Broken bike

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Elmers End Road, Anerley, Greater London

item.title: Dumped large furniture, 12th April
item.description:
25 jim bradley close have dump large furniture out the back of their garden on the green behind

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Wellington Street, Woolwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Shopping Trollies, 12th April
item.description:
Location: Outside 49-53 Darenth Road. Note: I have asked L&Q to write the residents as this is the second time 5 shopping trollies have been reported.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Darenth Road, East Wickham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Gas canisters dumped by sign in hazeldene rd, 12th April
item.description:
Gas canisters risk to children and pets

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hazeldene Road, Welling, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Offensive Graffiti sprayed all oved the facade of the building, 12th April
item.description:
I first noticed this graffiti sprayed all over the building on Sunday 12 of April 2026. It looks like some sort of revenge to a tenant of Chaplin Close

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Chaplin Close, Southwark, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti tag on old brown brick wall next to 136 Westbridge Road SW11 3PF, 12th April
item.description:
Black spray tag graffiti AemRKs on plaster
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 140, Westbridge Road, Battersea, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: White parking line not replaced after recent resurfacing, 12th April
item.description:
The white parking guideline in front of the driveway of 87 Blackbrook Lane was not replaced with the other road markings after the recent resurfacing. So close to the school it is very necessary.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Blackbrook Lane, Southborough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping on Tower Court estate, 12th April
item.description:
People keep dumping rubbish and furniture on our estate and it's really unfair and unsightly. Please can you sanction people or at least try and stop them.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Clapton Common, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping on Bazalgette Way, London, 12th April
item.description:
I am reporting a second, much larger fly-tipping incident at the same location. This new pile is blocking a significant portion of the road and includes heavy white goods (fridge/freezer and washing machine), a mattress, shelving, and a large volume of textiles and bagged waste. Given the size and the fact it is obstructing the highway, this requires urgent removal.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bazalgette Way, Lower Belvedere, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: More fly tipping, 12th April
item.description:
Again more in the same spot, it makes this a horrible place to live. There is no respect for neighbours

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Clapton Common, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Furniture and rubbish bags, 12th April
item.description:
Fly tipping on the pavement

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Bradstock Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree branch broken off on peninsular, 12th April
item.description:
Part of a tree has broken off and is now at edge of pond on peninsular. That is the green area almost opposite Court road entrance off the path.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Court Road, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
